The Cota Team

Thank you for your interest in working for Cota. We are a non-profit community-based organization that has been supporting adults with mental health and cognitive challenges to live well within their communities for 50 years. At Cota, we strive to offer our employees an enriching career experience through dynamic teams that prioritize client-centered care. Working with us means entering a rewarding environment of collaboration and support!

Our staff provide hope to thousands of clients and their families by collaborating with clients and their support systems and using a recovery-based approach to help clients define and pursue their goals.

Download the transcript here: Cota Opportunities video transcript

Organizational Culture & Support

Cota is dedicated to embodying its core values throughout every aspect of the organization, from programs and services to committees and policies. This commitment ensures that these principles remain at the forefront all our operations.

We are proud to be an open and inclusive workplace that celebrates diversity in all forms – regardless of race, culture, orientation or gender identity. All experience levels are welcomed!
